features: ALL DAY CONFIDENCE: No matter what life throws your way, you can stay fresh, dry and confident when you use Sanex Dermo Invisible Antiperspirant Deodorant Spray.
UP TO 24-HOUR PROTECTION: Our antiperspirant deodorant has been specially formulated to give you effective protection from sweat and odour for up to an impressive 24 hours.
ANTI-STAIN PROTECTION: With anti-stain protection, our antiperspirant deodorant spray won’t leave any traces or marks on your clothes, towels and sheets.
CARES FOR SKIN: This antiperspirant deodorant has been dermatologically tested and restores your skin’s natural pH.
description: Product Description Sanex Dermo Invisible Spray Antiperspirant gives you confidence with effective sweat and odour protection for up to 24 hours. The spray antiperspirant delivers anti-stain protection for clothes. Ingredients Isobutane, Butane, Propane, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Dimethicone, Isododecane, Parfum, Isopropyl Palmitate, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cocoglycerides. Directions Shake well before use. Hold the can at arm's length and spray a thin, even layer onto the underarm area. Allow to dry before getting dressed.
